title: ChatGPT Images 2.0
summary: OpenAI发布ChatGPT Images 2.0，提供更强大的图像生成功能，并附有直播链接展示新特性。

title: Qwen3.6-Max-Preview: Smarter, Sharper, Still Evolving
summary: 阿里云发布通义千问3.6-Max预览版，模型在智能性和精准度上显著提升，持续优化迭代中。

title: Show HN: GoModel – an open-source AI gateway in Go
text:
Hi, I’m Jakub, a solo founder based in Warsaw.

I’ve been building GoModel since December with a couple of contributors. It's an open-source AI gateway that sits between your app and model providers like OpenAI, Anthropic or others.

I built it for my startup to solve a few problems:

  - track AI usage and cost per client or team
  - switch models without changing app code
  - debug request flows more easily
  - reduce AI spendings with exact and semantic caching
How is it different?

  - ~17MB docker image
    - LiteLLM's image is more than 44x bigger ("docker.litellm.ai/berriai/litellm:latest" ~ 746 MB on amd64)
  - request workflow is visible and easy to inspect    
  - config is environment-variable-first by default
I'm posting now partly because of the recent LiteLLM supply-chain attack. Their team handled it impressively well, but some people are looking at alternatives anyway, and GoModel is one.

Website: https://gomodel.enterpilot.io

Any feedback is appreciated.
summary: GoModel是一个用Go语言开发的开源AI网关，可连接应用与多种AI模型提供商，提供成本跟踪、模型切换、请求调试和缓存优化等功能，其Docker镜像仅17MB，比同类产品更轻量。

title: Ibuilt a tiny Unix‑like 'OS' with shell and filesystem for Arduino UNO (2KB RAM)
summary: 开发者创建了一个微型类Unix操作系统，包含Shell和文件系统，可在仅有2KB内存的Arduino UNO上运行。

title: High-Fidelity KV Cache Summarization Using Entropy and Low-Rank Reconstruction
summary: 该帖子介绍了一种利用熵和低秩重建技术实现高保真键值缓存摘要的方法，旨在提升缓存效率和性能。

title: Modern Rendering Culling Techniques
summary: 这篇文章介绍了现代渲染中的剔除技术，重点讲解了如何高效优化3D场景的渲染性能。

title: Soul Player C64 – A real transformer running on a 1 MHz Commodore 64
summary: 这个帖子介绍了一个在1 MHz的Commodore 64上运行的实时音频转换器"Soul Player C64"，展示了其高效性能和复古硬件上的创新应用。

title: Even 'uncensored' models can't say what they want
summary: 该文章探讨了即使标榜“无审查”的AI模型仍存在表达限制，揭示了技术背后的潜在控制机制。
